ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vhds" (
  "vhd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VHD */,
  "vhd_name" TEXT /* Name of the VHD */,
  "vhd_blob_name" TEXT /* Blob name of the VHD in storage */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the VHD */,
  "vhd_type" INTEGER /* Type of VHD (foreign key to vhd_types) */,
  "md5hash" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the VHD */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the VHD was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the VHD was last modified */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the VHD (foreign key to users) */,
  "compression_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if compression is enabled for the VHD */,
  "deduplication_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if deduplication is enabled for the VHD */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the VHD (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vhd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhds_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES vhd_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhds_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhds_vhd_type FOREIGN KEY ("vhd_type") REFERENCES vhd_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vhd_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VHD type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the VHD type (dynamic, fixed, diff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the VHD type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this type is the default type for new VHDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vhd_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VHD size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the VHD size (e.g., 50MB, 100MB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the VHD size */,
  "max_capacity" TEXT /* Maximum capacity that this size can be expanded to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vhd_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VHD relationship */,
  "parent_vhd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent VHD */,
  "child_vhd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child VHD */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhd_relationships_child_vhd_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_vhd_id") REFERENCES vhds ("vhd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhd_relationships_parent_vhd_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_vhd_id") REFERENCES vhds ("vhd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vhd_snapshots" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VHD snapshot */,
  "vhd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VHD the snapshot belongs to */,
  "snapshot_name" TEXT /* Name of the snapshot */,
  "snapshot_date" TEXT /* Date the snapshot was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the snapshot */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the snapshot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhd_snapshots_vhd_id FOREIGN KEY ("vhd_id") REFERENCES vhds ("vhd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vhd_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage entry */,
  "vhd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VHD stored */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location of the VHD in storage */,
  "storage_size" TEXT /* Size of the VHD in storage */,
  "storage_type" TEXT /* Type of storage (e.g., SSD, HDD) */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the storage is encrypted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhd_storage_vhd_id FOREIGN KEY ("vhd_id") REFERENCES vhds ("vhd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vhd_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "vhd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VHD the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vhd_metadata_vhd_id FOREIGN KEY ("vhd_id") REFERENCES vhds ("vhd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
